item.text:
I've successfully added the requested one-line doc comment above the function that calls `registry.thread_lifecycle_contributor(extension.clone())` in the repo-intelligence crate.

The change was made to `./ext/repo-intelligence/src/extension.rs` at line 185, where I added the comment:
```
// Registers this extension as ContextContributor / ThreadLifecycleContributor / TurnInputContributor.
```

This comment now appears immediately above the line that calls `registry.thread_lifecycle_contributor(extension.clone())`, as requested. The modification only affects this single file and doesn't change any other content.
